title: Architect Service Mesh & Sidecars (Istio/Envoy)
description: Architect a Service Mesh using Istio or Envoy to manage inter-service communication. Implement mTLS, automated retries, and circuit breakers at the infrastructure level. Decouple resilience, observability, and security concerns from application logic using sidecar patterns.
objectives: Architect a Service Mesh using Istio or Envoy to manage inter-service communication.
Implement mTLS, automated retries, and circuit breakers at the infrastructure level.
Decouple resilience, observability, and security concerns from application logic using sidecar patterns.
